about_h1_1: Who We Are and What Drives Us
about_h3_8: Our story in the journey to make industrial storage more efficient, safe and accessible
about_p_21: Mutzagim Storage and Display Solutions was established in 1995 with a clear vision - to provide advanced industrial storage solutions that transform the way businesses manage their resources. We believe that a good storage system is not just shelves - it's infrastructure that enables businesses to grow, become more efficient and succeed.
about_p_22: For many years, we specialize in providing industrial storage shelving solutions for factories and businesses of all sizes. The experience we've gained and the expertise we've developed allow us to deeply understand the unique challenges of each industry and provide customized solutions that meet the precise needs of our customers.
about_p_23: We are proud to have become trusted partners to hundreds of businesses and factories across the country. Every project we undertake is a new opportunity to learn, develop and improve our service. Our commitment to quality, safety and excellent customer service is what drives us forward every day.
about_p_24: We use only the highest quality raw materials and work according to strict manufacturing standards. Every product undergoes rigorous quality inspections before reaching the customer. Our industrial storage shelves for factories are built to last for many years.
about_p_25: Worker and equipment safety is our top priority. Every storage solution we provide meets international safety standards and undergoes comprehensive stability and load testing. We also provide professional safety training for our customers' teams.
about_p_26: We invest in continuous research and development to stay at the forefront of technology and innovation in the field of industrial storage. Our heavy-duty storage solutions and compactus facilities for businesses incorporate advanced technologies to improve efficiency and convenience.
about_p_27: We see every customer as a long-term partner. Our commitment doesn't end with installation - we provide ongoing support, routine maintenance and full availability for any question or problem. Customer satisfaction is our measure of success.
about_p_28: Our team consists of engineers, planners and skilled installation teams with extensive experience in the field. We invest in continuous training of our employees to ensure they are updated with the most advanced technologies and working methods.
about_p_29: We are committed to acting responsibly towards the environment. Our products are manufactured from sustainable materials, and all our manufacturing processes are carried out with strict attention to reducing emissions and minimal environmental impact.
about_p_30: With many years of experience in the field of industrial storage, we bring to the table deep and extensive expertise in all aspects of planning, manufacturing and installation of storage systems. Our team includes certified engineers, experienced planners and skilled installation technicians who have undergone professional training.
about_p_31: We specialize in a wide range of solutions: industrial storage shelves for factories with particularly heavy loads, compactus facilities for businesses looking to maximize existing space, industrial furniture for logistics companies that requires workflow optimization. Each project is carefully planned by our experts using advanced three-dimensional planning software.
about_p_32: Our expertise spans across various industries: manufacturing plants, logistics companies, distribution warehouses, archives, libraries, laboratories and more. We understand the unique needs of each industry and are able to provide customized solutions that meet the specific challenges of each customer.
about_p_33: We begin with an in-depth meeting to understand your needs, challenges and goals. We will conduct a comprehensive survey of the facility and collect all the information needed to plan the perfect solution.
about_p_34: Our professional team designs the customized solution using advanced three-dimensional software. We will present the detailed plan to you and make adjustments as needed.
about_p_35: Products are manufactured in our factory while maintaining strict quality standards. Each component undergoes rigorous quality inspections before delivery.
about_p_36: Our skilled installation team performs quick and accurate installation with minimal disruption to ongoing operations. We take care of every detail and ensure compliance with safety standards.
about_p_37: After installation, we provide comprehensive training for your team on proper and safe use of the system. Our support continues over time with maintenance services and technical support.
about_p_38: We understand that choosing an industrial storage solutions provider is a significant decision for your business. Therefore, we are committed to providing not only quality products, but also professional service, personal attention and ongoing support.
about_p_39: Every project we undertake is handled with the same level of professionalism and attention, whether it's a small system for a small business or a large project for an industrial plant. We believe every customer deserves the best, and we do everything to ensure that's the case.
about_p_40: Your business success is our success. We strive to build long-term relationships with our customers and be your trusted partner for all industrial storage needs. Whether you're looking for industrial storage shelves for factories, heavy-duty storage solutions, compactus facilities for businesses or industrial furniture for logistics companies - we're here for you.
about_p_41: Ready to start working with us? Our team of experts is waiting to hear from you and help you find the perfect solution for your needs.

services_h1_1: Industrial Storage Solutions Tailored to Every Need
services_p_12: We specialize in industrial storage shelving for factories designed to withstand harsh working conditions and particularly heavy loads. Our systems are built from high-quality steel with anti-corrosion coating and adapted to challenging industrial environments.
services_p_13: Every shelving system undergoes rigorous quality inspections and is designed by experienced engineers according to the specific needs of your factory. We offer a wide range of heights, widths and load capacities, ranging from 500 kg to 5 tons per shelf.
services_p_14: Our heavy-duty storage solutions are designed for businesses that store industrial equipment, heavy raw materials, or large products. We provide strong and stable storage systems that ensure maximum safety and exceptional load-bearing capacity.
services_p_15: The systems include special reinforcement rails, reinforced bases and safety locking mechanisms. Each solution is carefully designed taking into account the weight of the equipment, frequency of access and the business's logistical needs.
services_p_16: Our compactus systems for businesses offer a smart and space-saving storage solution. Our mobile systems enable savings of up to 50% in storage space, while maintaining full accessibility to all stored items.
services_p_17: The compactus is particularly suitable for archives, equipment warehouses, libraries, laboratories and logistics centers. The system includes a smooth and quiet sliding mechanism, automatic locking system and the option to integrate a computerized inventory management system.
services_p_18:
Our industrial furniture for logistics companies includes a wide range of storage and display solutions adapted to the special needs of the logistics industry.

Mutzagim company offers a wide and rich variety of industrial furniture and plastic and metal storage containers. The company combines local manufacturing with imports from the world's leading manufacturers, these companies offer quality and professional storage solutions, such as workstations, multi-compartment carts, various types of cabinets, shelving systems and drawer sets, alongside plastic, metal and anti-static storage products.


The product range is available in a variety of configurations, colors and sizes, with customization options such as opening or sliding doors, locking mechanisms and multiple internal divisions. This allows us to design for each customer an integrated industrial furniture system - including shelves, cabinets, drawers and more - precisely adapted to their needs.
services_p_19: The systems are designed to work in harmony with forklifts, automation systems and other logistics equipment. We specialize in creating optimal workflow that increases efficiency and shortens collection and distribution times.
services_p_20: Every project begins with a comprehensive survey of your facility and in-depth analysis of unique needs and challenges. Our team of engineers and planners works with you step by step to create the perfect storage solution.
services_p_21: We consider every relevant parameter: ceiling height, aisle width, type of stored equipment, access frequency, safety requirements and budget. The result is an efficient, safe storage system precisely adapted to your needs.
services_p_22: Our professional installation team consists of skilled and certified technicians with many years of experience. We perform fast and accurate installation with minimal disruption to the business's ongoing operations.
services_p_23: After installation, we provide comprehensive training to your team on proper and safe use of the system. Our service doesn't end with installation - we offer ongoing maintenance, technical support and future upgrade services.
services_p_24: Quality and safety are at the top of our priorities. Every product undergoes rigorous quality inspections at every stage of production and installation. We work according to strict international safety standards and ensure compliance with all relevant regulations.
services_p_25: Our systems undergo load tests, stability tests and comprehensive safety inspections before delivery. We provide complete documentation of all tests and appropriate safety certifications. Additionally, we offer periodic inspection services to ensure the systems continue to meet safety standards over time.
services_p_26: Our team of experts is ready to help you find the perfect solution for your needs. Contact us today for professional consultation and a price quote.

esd_containers_h2_3: Why is ESD Important for Your Business?
esd_containers_p_11:
Advanced packaging, transport and storage solutions designed to protect sensitive electronic components from electrostatic discharge. 
        Our products integrate seamlessly with industrial storage shelving for factories and automated logistics systems.
esd_containers_p_12: Wide range of heavy-duty and light storage solutions, made from conductive polypropylene (Conductive PP) for long-term durability.
esd_containers_p_13: Boxes in European standard dimensions, stackable, suitable for automated systems and transport on pallets.
esd_containers_p_14: Open compartments (Picking Bins) for accessible storage of small components, screws and miniature electronic equipment.
esd_containers_p_15: Slotted systems for vertical and safe storage and drying of printed circuit boards to prevent contact.
esd_containers_p_16: Mobile solutions for field technicians. Hard cases with internal anti-static foam for transport protection.
esd_containers_p_17:
Static electricity is the silent enemy of the electronics industry. Component damage can occur at very low voltages that humans cannot feel at all. 
            Using standard anti-static equipment ensures:
esd_containers_p_18: Our professional team will be happy to customize the exact solution for you, from individual boxes to heavy-duty storage solutions for logistics warehouses.

vlm_vertical_storage_h1_1: Vertical Storage Solutions - VLM (Vertical Lift Module)
vlm_vertical_storage_h2_4: Ready to Upgrade Your Storage System?
vlm_vertical_storage_p_11:
The automated revolution in your warehouse: maximum storage with minimum floor space
The VLM system is an automated vertical warehouse based on a smart internal elevator. The system stores trays in a tall, enclosed structure and retrieves them for the operator at the push of a button. This method brings goods to the person (Goods-to-Person), saving valuable walking time and preventing picking errors.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_12:
Maximum space utilization: Utilizing building height up to the ceiling allows savings of up to 90% of floor space compared to conventional shelving.
Precise inventory management: Software interface (WMS) that manages every item at the tray and exact location level.
Ergonomics and safety: The operator receives goods at the ideal working height, without the need to climb ladders or bend down.
Product protection: Goods are stored within an enclosed structure that protects them from dust, damage and unauthorized access.
Picking speed: Dramatic improvement in work pace thanks to eliminating search and walking time in the warehouse.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_13:
The system is customized to customer needs and warehouse structure:
System height - from 3 meters up to 15 meters (depending on ceiling height).
Tray load capacity - options for trays carrying from 250 kg up to 1,000 kg per single tray.
Tray width - wide range of sizes (for example from 1.9 meters up to 4 meters).
Dynamic height management - the system measures the height of items on the tray and positions it with the minimum possible clearance for optimal volume utilization.
Work openings - multiple work openings (picking windows) can be integrated on different floors or on both sides of the machine.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_14:
The system is suitable for any business managing inventory of small to medium parts:
* Automotive industry: spare parts storage.
* Pharma and medical equipment: managing sensitive items and expiration dates.
* Electronics: small components requiring protection and clean environment.
* Maintenance (MRO): storage of work tools and technical equipment for factories.
* E-commerce: fast picking of multi-item orders.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_15:
1. Laser pointer / Point-to-Light: Light beam that shows the operator exactly which item to take from the tray.
2. Extractable trays: Option for full extraction of the tray outside the machine for convenient loading using a forklift.
3. Weighing system: Prevents overloading of trays and controls inventory by weight.
4. Temperature control: Dedicated solutions for refrigerated or controlled environment storage.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_16:
What happens in case of power failure? There is a backup system that allows manual lowering of trays and complete safety for the operator.
Does the system interface with our ERP? Yes, the system includes inventory management software that can synchronize with SAP, Priority and other systems.
How long does it take to install such a system? Depending on size, typical installation takes between one to two weeks after equipment arrives on site.
vlm_vertical_storage_p_17: Our experts will customize the perfect vertical storage system for your building dimensions and business logistics needs.
